CLINT

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x2000000
Size:
0xc000
Source:
clint_rf.rdl

Description

Core Local Interruptor. Generates machine software and machine timer interrupts for Hart 0. The E31 Core Complex CLINT complies with The RISC-V ISM, Volume II: Privileged Architecture, Version 1.10.

Contents

Offset Identifier Name
0x0000 msip Machine Software Interrupt Pending
0x0004 - -
0x4000 mtimecmp Machine Timer Compare
0x4008 - -
0xBFF8 mtime Machine Timer
